sizing_rule.note: Position size = Fixed Dollar Risk ($500) / (20-day ATR × 1.0). Inverse volatility scaling: higher ATR → smaller position, lower ATR → larger position. Capped at 2% max position size per instrument.

source_rule_text: A trader should scale position size according to the volatility of each portfolio element, measured by average true range, to normalize risk exposure across instruments with different price fluctuations.
